name: Emergency Equipment Rental Sourcing and Approval Workflow

parameters.content:
## 🏗️ Equipment Breakdown — Automated Rental Sourcing

### How it works
When a site foreman reports a machine breakdown via Telegram (or a web form), this workflow springs into action. It parses the request, fires rental quote emails to five vendors simultaneously, waits for responses, then feeds all quotes into an AI model that compares them and produces a ranked recommendation. The project manager receives a single approval email with a comparison table and one-click Approve / Reject buttons. On approval, the winning vendor gets a booking confirmation and the foreman gets a Telegram update.

### Setup steps
1. **Telegram Bot** — connect your bot credentials under *Telegram: Breakdown Report* and update the webhook.
2. **Gmail OAuth2** — link your Google account to all three Gmail nodes (Send Vendor Emails, Email PM, Confirm Booking).
3. **Azure OpenAI** — add your Azure endpoint and API key to the *Azure OpenAI Chat Model* credential.
4. **Vendor list** — open *Split Into Vendor Items* and replace the placeholder vendor names and emails with your actual suppliers.
5. **PM email** — in *Email PM: Comparison + Approval* and *Email: Rejection Notice*, replace the recipient address with your project manager's email.
6. **Approval webhook URL** — in *Parse AI Analysis*, replace `YOUR-N8N-INSTANCE` with your live n8n domain.
7. Do a test run using the Telegram command: `/breakdown Excavator | Site A | 3`

## 📡 Intake & Normalisation
Accepts breakdown reports from two entry points — a Telegram bot command or a web form — and normalises both into a single consistent data shape. Generates a unique Breakdown ID and timestamps the report before anything else runs.

## 📧 Vendor Outreach
Splits the request into one item per vendor and sends each a formatted HTML quote-request email via Gmail. The workflow then pauses and waits for replies before proceeding — giving vendors a defined window to respond.

## 🤖 AI Quote Analysis
Collects all vendor responses, filters out unavailable suppliers, then passes the shortlist to an Azure OpenAI model. The AI returns a structured JSON payload containing an HTML comparison table, a recommended vendor with rationale, risk flags, and an executive summary — ready to drop straight into the PM's approval email.

## ✅ PM Approval & Booking
Emails the project manager a full vendor comparison with one-click Approve / Reject links. On approval, a booking confirmation goes to the winning vendor and the foreman receives a Telegram notification. On rejection, a manual-review alert is sent instead.

## 🔐 Credentials & Security
Use OAuth2 for Gmail and a scoped Azure OpenAI API key. Store all secrets in n8n credentials — never hardcode them in code nodes. Replace all placeholder emails and vendor addresses before publishing or sharing this template.

nodes.name: Telegram: Breakdown Report
nodes.notes: Listens for /breakdown command from foreman. Message format: /breakdown [machine_type] | [site_name] | [duration_days]

parameters.message:
=

⚠️ Urgent Equipment Rental Request

Dear {{ $json.vendor.name }} Team,

We have an emergency equipment breakdown and require an immediate rental replacement. Please reply to this email with your availability and pricing as soon as possible.

FieldDetails
Reference ID{{ $json.breakdownId }}
Machine Required{{ $json.machineType }}
Site Location{{ $json.siteName }}
Duration Needed{{ $json.durationDays }} day(s)
Urgency{{ $json.urgency }}
Reported At{{ $json.reportedAt }}

Please reply with:

  1. Availability (Yes / No / Partial)
  2. Daily rental rate (inc. delivery)
  3. Earliest delivery time to site
  4. Any additional conditions

This is an automated request. Please reply directly to this email. Reference ID: {{ $json.breakdownId }}
parameters.subject: =🚨 Urgent Rental Request – {{ $json.machineType }} | {{ $json.siteName }} | Ref: {{ $json.breakdownId }}

nodes.name: Email PM: Vendor Comparison + Approval Request
nodes.notes: Change sendTo to your actual PM email address

parameters.message:
=

Equipment Rental Approval Required

📋 Breakdown Summary
Machine: {{ $('Normalise Intake Data').item.json.machineType }} | Site: {{ $('Normalise Intake Data').item.json.siteName }} | Duration: | Urgency: {{ $('Normalise Intake Data').item.json.urgency }}
Reported by: {{ $('Normalise Intake Data').item.json.foremanName }} at{{ $('Normalise Intake Data').item.json.reportedAt }}

📊 Vendor Comparison

{{ $json.analysis.comparisonTableHtml }}
✅ AI Recommendation: {{ $json.analysis.recommendedVendor }}
{{ $json.analysis.recommendedVendorRationale }}
{% if $json.analysis.riskFlags.length > 0 %}
⚠️ Risk Flags:
    {% for flag in $json.analysis.riskFlags %}
  • {{ $json.analysis.riskFlags[0] }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %}

Executive Summary:
{{ $json.analysis.executiveSummary }}

✅ APPROVE BOOKING ❌ REJECT / MANUAL REVIEW

This is an automated recommendation. Reference: {{ $json.breakdownId }}
parameters.subject: =⚡ Approval Required: Equipment Rental for {{ $('Split Into Vendor Items').item.json.machineType }} |  {{ $('Split Into Vendor Items').item.json.siteName }}| Ref: {{ $('Split Into Vendor Items').item.json.breakdownId }}

parameters.message:
=

✅ Rental Booking Confirmed

Dear {{ $json.analysis.recommendedVendor }} Team,

We are pleased to confirm the following rental booking. Please proceed with delivery arrangements as per the details below.

FieldDetails
Booking Reference{{ $('Split Into Vendor Items').item.json.breakdownId }}
Machine Required{{ $('Split Into Vendor Items').item.json.machineType }}
Delivery Site{{ $('Split Into Vendor Items').item.json.siteName }}
Rental Duration{{ $('Split Into Vendor Items').item.json.durationDays }} day(s)
Approved At{{ new Date().toISOString() }}

Please confirm receipt and provide your expected delivery time by return email.

Thank you for your prompt response.

Reference: {{ $json.breakdownId }}
parameters.subject: =✅ Booking Confirmed – {{ $('Split Into Vendor Items').item.json.machineType }} |  {{ $('Split Into Vendor Items').item.json.siteName }}| Ref: {{ $('Split Into Vendor Items').item.json.breakdownId }}

nodes.name: Notify Foreman via Telegram: Booking Confirmed
nodes.notes: Only fires if foreman submitted via Telegram and provided chat ID

parameters.message:
=

Rental Booking Rejected – Manual Review Required

The automated rental recommendation for {{ $json.machineType }} at {{ $json.siteName }} was rejected.

Reference: {{ $json.breakdownId }}

Please contact vendors directly or re-run the workflow with updated parameters.

This is an automated notification.
parameters.subject: =ℹ️ Rental Request Rejected – Manual Review Required | {{ $json.breakdownId }}

nodes.name: AI Agent: Analyse & Rank Vendor Quotes

parameters.content:
## ⚠️ Error Handler
Catches any failure in the workflow and posts a Slack alert with the error message, failing node name, and execution ID. Wire the error output of any critical node here to prevent silent failures going unnoticed.

main.node: Notify Foreman via Telegram: Booking Confirmed
Email PM: Vendor Comparison + Approval Request
AI Agent: Analyse & Rank Vendor Quotes
